source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
A billiard ball rolling across a table in the \( +x \) direction at \( 3 \, \text{m/s} \) hits the edge of the table at a perpendicular angle, and bounces back in the \( -x \) direction, now traveling at \( 2 \, \text{m/s} \) in the opposite direction. The greatest magnitude of acceleration for the billiard ball was at time
<image_1>
extraction_notes: answer field is lowercase option label 'c', mapped to choice C
image_1 exists only as an in-memory PIL image placeholder, not a concrete path or URL

issues: metadata.image_paths is empty while top-level image_paths provides one image path.
question_text contains the placeholder '<image_1>', and metadata notes the original image_1 existed only as an in-memory PIL image placeholder rather than a concrete path or URL.

image_dependency: 题干显式说“Based on the velocity-time graph”，核心信息来自图像而非纯文本。
requires_image=true 且 text_dominant=false，表明该题主要依赖图像内容。
需要从速度-时间图读取加速度大小最大的时刻，属于典型图表依赖任务。
multi_step: 求解需要先识别速度-时间图中斜率对应加速度，再比较各时刻加速度大小。
还需结合碰撞前后速度方向变化（+x 到 -x）理解加速度符号与大小，但计算链条不算很长。
答案是离散时间点选择，说明推理存在步骤但整体复杂度中等。
verifiability: 答案是明确的单一时间点“t = 5 × 10^-3 s”，可与标准答案直接核对。
提供了 5 个候选项，输出空间清晰，易于自动判分。
若图像可读取，可通过检查速度-时间图斜率最大处对应时刻来验证过程与结论。

risk_flags: asset_registry issues mention an image placeholder/history mismatch, which could affect exact graph availability despite registry_passed=true.
question_text references an image/graph, so missing or degraded visual content would block reliable scoring.

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和主图像资产均存在，核心语义仍可恢复，不应过早 reject。
该题对图像依赖很高，题干明确基于速度-时间图作答，因此任何图像资产不一致都会显著影响可靠性。
登记记录存在图像占位符/路径元数据不一致问题，虽 registry_passed=true，但仍需要后续人工或流程复核。
答案可验证性较高，保留进入候选池有价值，但当前资产风险使其优先级应下调。
